multiplechoiceresponse.label: When are the deadlines for your work in this course?

choicegroup.choice: There are no assignments in this course.
Every Sunday night at 23:30 UTC. That was the deadline in the previous run of this course. This run is different.
As long as the work is complete before the last day it's ok.

div.p: You must complete all course material by the end of the course if you're trying for a Verified Certificate. However, we encourage you to work early and often! Leaving things for the last day may mean that you don't receive your grade on a peer-graded assignment because there's no time for anyone to grade you.
